tiers.label: Smoker / Commercial
tiers.description: Offset smokers, pellet grills, restaurant units

addons.label: Add Kamado to another grill cleaning
addons.note: Customer must already be booking another tier (standard_gas, large_gas, or smoker_commercial).

disclaimer: Price is firm for conditions as described. On arrival, Sam may adjust within a reasonable range if the job is materially different (e.g., significantly more buildup than described). You'll be told before any work begins.
